testcase.name: the mutation count bounds must be positive and ordered()
fuzz returns each seed once, in order, before any candidate()
mutate is reproducible from the same Random()

failure.message: kotlin.NotImplementedError: An operation is not implemented: Exercise 1: apply one randomly chosen mutator from Mutators

testcase.failure: kotlin.NotImplementedError: An operation is not implemented: Exercise 1: apply one randomly chosen mutator from Mutators at de.seuhd.ktfuzzer.mode.mutational.MutationalFuzzer.mutate$iase26_assignment04(MutationalFuzzer.kt:47) at de.seuhd.ktfuzzer.mode.mutational.MutationalFuzzerTest.mutate is reproducible from the same Random(MutationalFuzzerTest.kt:51) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)
